title: SEO GSC clicks (daily facts)
description: Sample Grafana panel — import into dashboard, set ClickHouse datasource UID.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  fact_date AS time,
  sum(metric_value) AS clicks
FROM ptt.seo_daily_facts
WHERE metric_name = 'gsc_clicks'
  AND customer_id = $customer_id
  AND fact_date >= today() - 28
GROUP BY fact_date
ORDER BY fact_date
